turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I had surgery here two months ago and submitted a reimbursement claim to my insurer. They're asking for a certificate from the hospital. Can you help?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course! We do issue discharge summaries, treatment certificates, and other documents needed for reimbursement. Your name please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Sharma, which specific certificate is the insurer asking for?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: They want a final discharge summary with the ICD code and treating doctor's signature.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's standard. Please submit a written request at our medical records counter — they're open 9 AM to 5 PM Monday to Friday. The document is typically ready in 3 working days and costs ₹200 as a processing fee.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can I request it by email instead of coming in?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, you can email the request to records@sunriseclinicpune.com with your patient ID and phone number. Attach a scan or photo of your ID for verification. They'll reply with the timeline.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Happy to help, Mr. Sharma. Hope your claim goes through smoothly!
